settings.title: Biology determines your microbiome
settings.text: The HELIUS study (2,084 subjects, 6 ethnic groups) proved ethnicity is the strongest predictor of gut microbiome composition — more than diet, age, or lifestyle.

settings.title: Your ancestral microbiome is depleting
settings.text: Immigration and dietary westernization cause ancestral bacterial populations to collapse within a single generation.

settings.title: Most probiotics don't survive
settings.text: Without acid-protection delivery, up to 96% of probiotic bacteria die before reaching the gut. MAKTREK Bi-Pass solves this.

settings.question: What is Origin?
settings.answer: Origin is the first ethnobiotic — a probiotic informed by biological diversity research. 40 billion CFU, 4 targeted strains, MAKTREK Bi-Pass delivery, FOS prebiotic. 60 veggie capsules per bottle (30-day supply).

settings.question: How is Origin different from other probiotics?
settings.answer: Most probiotics use generic strains for an average person. Origin's strains are selected based on biological diversity research — specifically the HELIUS study (2,084 subjects, 6 ethnic groups). Plus MAKTREK acid-protection ensures bacteria arrive alive.

settings.question: How do I take Origin?
settings.answer: Take 2 capsules daily with water. Morning or evening, with or without food. Each bottle is a 30-day supply.

settings.question: Is Origin vegan?
settings.answer: Yes. HPMC (hypromellose) veggie capsules. No gelatin, no animal products.

settings.question: What's your return policy?
settings.answer: 30-day money-back guarantee. If Origin doesn't work for you, email hello@basecodehealth.com for a full refund. No questions asked.
